verifier_scope: Review whether declared runtime replay, dependency state, source provenance, and policy artifact claims can be verified with the evidence available inside the current boundary.
unsupported_conditions: external attestation is required but not provided
runtime replay record is required but not provided
dependency state snapshot is required but not provided
source provenance record is required but not provided
policy fingerprint cannot be resolved to a canonical policy artifact
unsupported_claims: External attestation cannot be verified with available evidence.
Runtime replay cannot be verified with available evidence.
Dependency state cannot be verified with available evidence.
Source provenance cannot be verified with available evidence.
Canonical policy artifact resolution cannot be verified with available evidence.

verification_outcomes.PASS: Not available because required external evidence is missing from the current review boundary.
verification_outcomes.FAIL: Not asserted because the available evidence does not prove contradiction; it only fails to support the declared claims inside the current boundary.
verification_outcomes.UNSUPPORTED: The declared verification claims cannot be resolved with the available evidence and must remain unsupported.
